title: むかしむかし、あるところに。

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first three years of every racer's career are
incredibly important. During those years, Rice
Shower has achieved some incredible feats.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: People all over have praised her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...An a-award ceremony?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You did help make the Takarazuka
Kinen happen, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So many people in the URA want to celebrate you
by holding a ceremony in your honor.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm happy to hear it, but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By all means, please grace them with your
presence.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The staff from the Hanshin and Kyoto
Racecourses are looking forward to seeing you
there as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... They're the ones who did everything in their
power when I asked for help.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right. I have to thank them in person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Rice Shower and I visit the Hanshin
Racecourse together.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-there are so many people... And it's not even a
raceday…

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wow, look, it's Rice! Oooh, she's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Rice! It's so great to see you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What?!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: Long time no see, you two!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's nice to see you again! But, um... what's going
on?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Oh this? Well, the original plan was just a
celebration with the staff, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Rice! Look over here!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, there were lots of fans that also
wanted to see you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! L-love?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly. So we changed our plans and pulled
a few strings.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
As a result, the award ceremony is now open to
the general public.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I see... Then all these people... came to see me?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
That's right... By the way, may we ask you to do
what you weren't able to do last time?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Here, in front of all the people excited to see
you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uh, um... Hi, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm Ri—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-haha... sorry. The mic is kind of...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I hope I didn't hurt your ears.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! We're okay!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you. Ummm, well...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I would like to thank everyone for coming here to
see me today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen anything like this before, and... I'm
so happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So, so happy... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Don't cry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-right! Sorry... I won't cry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because today, I want to be able to look you all
in the eye while I talk to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I used to be really lonely. I was stuck cowering
in a dark place, always hiding away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I'm not alone anymore.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's because of all of you that I'm able to stand
here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You brought me light, and gave me a place to
belong to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, from the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
We'll now move on to presenting the certificate
of our gratitude as well as the award. Please turn
your attention to the screen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hi, everyone! Hi, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Greetings.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Come on, Bourbon! Don't be shy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have analyzed the script thoroughly. You are the
only one who is supposed to speak.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's fiiine! Don't worry about the script!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Anyway, there's tons of Rice fans over here too!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Data indicates plans for a commemorative plaque
are currently underway as well.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey! Don't ruin the surprise, Bourbon!
Shhh! Shhh!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Broadcast time has elapsed. Back to you,
Hanshin.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What, time's up?! Bye-bye, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I'm sorry... I said that I wouldn't cry, but...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Miss Rice, do you have anything you'd like to
add?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone... I'm going to continue working hard,
so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please... please continue to support me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the bus home...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yawn... That was fun... I didn't think today would be so memorable.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Brother. Because of you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Sister. Because of you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I could...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yeah... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I was always so useless, but now I've become a
blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the book, I know bad things will still
probably happen sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But this blue rose's wish is to keep blooming and
to bring happiness to everyone, forever and ever.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Alongside my favorite person in the whole wide
world.
